planningNote: Planned test locations marked TBD are handoff targets and do not claim files already exist. Concrete paths must be selected by implementation/test owners after the shared-mobile runtime is chosen.

scopes.scopeName: Shared Schema, Mobile Foundation, Auth, And Fail-Loud Config

tests.file: TBD: clients/mobile/assistant shared schema generation test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned: incompatible schema change fails shared mobile codegen for iPhone/iOS and Android

tests.file: TBD: web/pwa generated assistant schema test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned: web generated validator rejects incompatible schema drift

tests.file: TBD: shared assistant renderer fixture canary
tests.plannedTitle: Planned: one golden response fixture produces equivalent web, iPhone/iOS, and Android render descriptors

tests.file: TBD: clients/mobile/assistant platform declaration test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned: shared mobile build declares both ios and android targets from one codebase

tests.file: TBD: assistant HTTP transport hint integration test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned: web and mobile transport hints are accepted and telemetry-only for web, iPhone/iOS, and Android clients

tests.file: TBD: web and shared mobile sensitive storage guard tests
tests.plannedTitle: Planned: no web or shared mobile renderer/core path persists bearer/session material

tests.file: TBD: web and mobile client config fail-loud tests
tests.plannedTitle: Planned: missing backend URL/schema/platform/auth config fails without fallback defaults

tests.file: TBD: live assistant transport hint e2e test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned regression: live web/mobile hints do not alter server response shape

tests.file: TBD: web/pwa assistant chat e2e test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned regression: web authenticated turn posts and renders response body, sources, and controls

tests.file: TBD: web/pwa assistant retry e2e test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned regression: web timeout retry reuses the same transport_message_id

tests.file: TBD: web/pwa assistant accessibility e2e test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned: ARIA live region and keyboard navigation reach composer and controls

tests.file: TBD: web assistant auth storage guard test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned: assistant web client does not read/write bearer tokens in browser storage

tests.file: TBD: shared mobile platform parity build test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned: one shared mobile codebase builds or validates ios and android targets from the same renderer/state core

tests.file: TBD: shared mobile retry parity e2e test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned regression: iPhone/iOS and Android timeout retries reuse each platform's original transport_message_id

tests.file: TBD: iPhone/iOS VoiceOver assistant accessibility test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned regression: VoiceOver announces response roles, controls, citations, capture acknowledgement, retry/offline, and session errors

tests.file: TBD: Android TalkBack assistant accessibility test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned regression: TalkBack announces response roles, controls, citations, capture acknowledgement, retry/offline, and session errors

tests.file: TBD: shared mobile fail-loud config test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned: missing mobile backend URL/schema/platform/auth config fails for iPhone/iOS and Android without defaults

tests.file: TBD: shared mobile sensitive storage guard test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned: shared mobile renderer/core stores no bearer/session material in durable client storage

scopes.scopeName: Cross-Surface Response Controls, Capture, And Parity

tests.file: TBD: web and shared mobile disambiguation parity e2e test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned regression: disambiguation choice round-trips by ref/index on web, iPhone/iOS, and Android

tests.file: TBD: web and shared mobile confirm parity e2e test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned regression: confirm accept executes server-side and renders equivalent result structure on all three surfaces

tests.file: TBD: cross-transport capture acknowledgement parity test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned: capture acknowledgement shape/copy matches Telegram, HTTP-test, WhatsApp, web, iPhone/iOS, and Android fixtures

tests.file: TBD: assistant renderer no-branch guard test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned: renderer has no scenario/action/platform/transport-hint branching and falls back to text

tests.file: TBD: live client transport hint parity e2e test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned regression: web and mobile transport hints do not alter visible response shape on web, iPhone/iOS, or Android

tests.file: TBD: web and shared mobile source detail parity e2e test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned regression: source detail opens, closes, returns focus, and exposes copy-safe metadata across web, iPhone/iOS, and Android
